special_mechanics.name: Multi-stage gameplay
special_mechanics.description: Game features four distinct stages with different movement paradigms: Stage 1 is side-scrolling jungle navigation with vertical/horizontal movement; Stage 2 is first-person tunnel navigation; Stage 3 is first-person bunker defense; Stage 4 is third-person jungle navigation with time limit and boss fight

special_mechanics.name: Vertical and horizontal navigation
special_mechanics.description: Stage 1 allows player to navigate both vertically and horizontally through jungle screens with obstacles and booby traps

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No precise physics parameters documented. Sources contain only qualitative gameplay descriptions and critical reception commentary. Movement mechanics are design-level descriptions rather than technical physics values. Game features four distinct gameplay modes with different control schemes and perspectives, making uniform physics extraction inappropriate.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Platoon NES page)
